title: Mystical Gems
description: MysticalGems brings powerful magical gems into your Minecraft world — each with unique abilities. Collect, activate, and use them in combat, exploration, or to enhance your character. Perfect for survival, RPG, and adventure servers!
body:
MysticalGems – Magical Power Gems



✨ Overview

MysticalGems is a fully server-side plugin for Minecraft (Paper) that adds six magical, activatable gemstones to your world. Each gem grants a unique ability triggered by a right-click. Whether you’re running a PvE challenge, RPG server, or casual survival experience – this plugin adds strategy, magic, and flair to your gameplay.

⸻

💠 The 6 Magical Gems & Their Abilities
	•	🔥 Fire Gem – Launches a burning fireball
	•	🌊 Water Gem – Grants extended underwater breathing
	•	🌱 Earth Gem – Provides absorption and a small explosion
	•	💨 Air Gem – Gives levitation, speed, and slow falling
	•	⚡ Lightning Gem – Strikes lightning at your position
	•	🕶️ Shadow Gem – Teleports you forward and grants invisibility

Each gem includes custom particles and sound effects to enhance immersion.

⸻

⚙️ Features

✅ Right-click activation of powers
✅ Cooldown system to balance gem usage
✅ Fully configurable via config.yml (durations, particles, sounds)
✅ /gem command: Get gems via /gem <fire|water|earth|air|lightning|shadow>
✅ Floating display above the player when holding a gem
✅ Progress-based rewards: Kill 100 Blazes → unlock Fire Gem
✅ No client mod required – 100% server-side

⸻

🧱 Requirements
	•	Minecraft server running Paper
	•	Version 1.21.5
	•	No additional plugins required

⸻

🎯 Who Is It For?
	•	✨ RPG or adventure servers looking to add magical powers
	•	⚔️ PvE servers with player progression
	•	🧪 Survival servers with lightweight enhancements
	•	🧱 Vanilla-friendly setups without client-side mods
